mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.`name`, a.remark, a.company_id companyId,
(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tenant_user b WHERE b.department_id = a.id) userNum,
(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_eve_user_staff b WHERE b.department_id = a.id) userNum,
(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM company_job c WHERE c.department_id = a.id) jobNum, a.overtime_settlement_type overtimeSettlementType, a.create_id createId, CONVERT(a.create_time, char) createTime, a.last_update_id lastUpdateId, CONVERT(a.last_update_time, char) lastUpdateTime FROM company_department a
${sqlExtract}
AND a.`name` LIKE '%${keyword}%'
AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) childsNum FROM
tenant_user b
sys_eve_user_staff b
WHERE b.department_id = #{id}

SELECT a.id, a.`name`, '部门' title, a.parent_id parentId, a.company_id companyId FROM company_department a
AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
